current_run.description: The oracle U_f acts as |x>|y> -> |x>|y XOR f(x)>, where f(x) = (popcount(x AND s) * popcount(x OR s)) % 2. The goal is to find the N-bit secret integer s. This function is quadratically non-linear in its dependence on x and s, and it is not a disguised version of textbook problems.
